name: Air Coolers
description: Portable evaporative air coolers for construction sites, warehouses, workshops, and outdoor events. High-capacity cooling for hot UAE conditions.

machines.name: Portacool Jetstream 260 Portable Evaporative Cooler
machines.shortDescription: Portable evaporative cooler with 260 L water tank and 8,500 CFM airflow. Portacool Jetstream 260 for large workshop, warehouse, and outdoor event cooling in UAE conditions.
machines.description: Portable evaporative cooler with 260 L water tank and 8,500 CFM airflow. Portacool Jetstream 260 for large workshop, warehouse, and outdoor event cooling in UAE conditions. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 260 L water tank runs over 6 hours on a single fill at maximum speed
8,500 CFM airflow cools 370 m² warehouse bays and workshop floors effectively
Küül rigid cellulose media resists mineral buildup from hard UAE water
230V single-phase power runs from any standard site outlet with no special wiring
Variable 2-speed fan with oscillating louvers for targeted or broad-area cooling
Heavy-duty locking castors and forklift pockets for rapid repositioning

machines.name: Honeywell CO60PM Commercial Outdoor Air Cooler
machines.shortDescription: Commercial outdoor evaporative cooler with 60 L tank and 1,800 CFM airflow. Honeywell CO60PM for patios, semi-open warehouses, and small workshop cooling.
machines.description: Commercial outdoor evaporative cooler with 60 L tank and 1,800 CFM airflow. Honeywell CO60PM for patios, semi-open warehouses, and small workshop cooling. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 60 L tank with continuous-fill hose connection for all-day unmanned operation
1,800 CFM cools 80 m² semi-open workshop areas without expensive AC infrastructure
Remote control with 3-speed fan and timer — no walking to the unit for adjustments
22 kg with integrated wheels — one person rolls it to wherever the crew is working
Ice compartment boosts cooling by 3-5°C during peak summer afternoon hours
58 dB(A) noise level — conversation quiet even at maximum fan speed

machines.name: Symphony Winter 56i Powerful Desert Air Cooler
machines.shortDescription: Symphony Winter 56i desert air cooler with 56 L tank and powerful air throw. Engineered for dry climate cooling in UAE construction offices and site accommodation.
machines.description: Symphony Winter 56i desert air cooler with 56 L tank and powerful air throw. Engineered for dry climate cooling in UAE construction offices and site accommodation. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Features: Drain pump, empty tank alarm, dust filter

features: i-Pure filtration captures construction dust before it enters the cooling pads
200W power draw — costs less than 1 AED per day to run on a standard tariff
56 L tank with auto-fill and drain pump for low-maintenance continuous operation
2,200 CFM airflow penetrates site office partitions and accommodation containers
Honeycomb pads designed specifically for dry desert air — optimal evaporation efficiency
Empty tank alarm and auto-shutoff prevent pump damage from dry running

machines.name: Climaline CC50 Heavy-Duty Industrial Air Cooler
machines.shortDescription: Heavy-duty industrial evaporative cooler with 50 L tank and high-static pressure fan. Climaline CC50 for factory floors, large tents, and construction site cooling towers.
machines.description: Heavy-duty industrial evaporative cooler with 50 L tank and high-static pressure fan. Climaline CC50 for factory floors, large tents, and construction site cooling towers. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Construction: Galvanized steel body with epoxy coating

features: 6,000 CFM with high static pressure pushes cool air through 10 m duct runs
Galvanized steel body with epoxy coating — built for construction yard abuse
50 L tank with float valve auto-fill from any garden hose connection
2-speed variable fan with direct-drive motor — zero belt maintenance
550W motor delivers commercial-grade cooling at household power consumption
Integrated lifting eyes and fork pockets for crane and forklift positioning
